remaining_params.SpellDescription: Create a 0/1 black Wizard creature token with "Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this token deals 1 damage to each opponent."

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever your commander enters or attacks, you may pay {2}. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.
